name: blender
summary: Drive Blender through a bundled stdio MCP bridge and the Blender MCP add-on.
description: Connect Artyx to Blender for scene inspection, procedural edits, materials, animation, cameras, lighting, and verification loops.

fields.label: Port
fields.help: Port the Blender MCP addon listens on.

companion.title: Finish setup inside Blender
companion.summary: Install and enable the Blender MCP add-on, then click Connect.
steps: Download the Blender MCP add-on (addon.py) from the official repo.
In Blender: Edit → Preferences → Add-ons → Install…, pick addon.py, enable 'Interface: Blender MCP'.
Open the N-panel (press N) → BlenderMCP tab → click 'Connect'. The add-on listens on 127.0.0.1:9876.
